sign_in.title: Sign in to Nuansu
sign_in.subtitle: We'll send a magic link — no password.
sign_in.no_account: New here? You'll get an account on first sign-in.

sign_up.title: Create your account
sign_up.subtitle: Free for 14 days, no card required.
sign_up.tos_acknowledgement: By continuing, you agree to the Terms and the Privacy Policy.

magic_link.sent_body: We sent a sign-in link to {{email}}. The link expires in 15 minutes.
magic_link.didnt_receive: Didn't get it? Check spam, or resend.

onboarding.title: A few quick questions
onboarding.subtitle: These set the defaults for new chats. You can change them per chat any time.
onboarding.source_lang_label: What language do you write in?
onboarding.default_target_lang_label: What language do you usually translate to?
onboarding.tos_check: I agree to the Terms and the Privacy Policy.

email_verify.pending_body: We sent a verification link to {{email}}. Click it to finish setup.
email_verify.expired_body: Magic links work for 15 minutes. Want a fresh one?

errors.invalid_email: That doesn't look like a valid email.
errors.expired_link: This sign-in link has expired. Request a new one.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts — wait a minute and try again.
errors.oauth_failed: Couldn't complete sign-in with that provider.
